title: Copper CRM vs Freshsales
description: Compare Copper CRM vs Freshsales in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right crm & sales tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Freshsales emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.1/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Copper CRM or Freshsales?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Freshsales edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. Copper CRM excels at CRM platform native to Google Workspace ecosystem., while Freshsales is stronger for All-in-one CRM with lead scoring, visual pipelines, and AI insights.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Copper CRM and Freshsales?
faqs.answer: Copper CRM and Freshsales differ in pricing ($23-69/mo vs $9–$69/user/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Copper CRM cheaper than Freshsales?
faqs.answer: Copper CRM starts at $23-69/mo while Freshsales starts at $9–$69/user/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Copper CRM or Freshsales?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for crm & sales. Freshsales scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Copper CRM and Freshsales together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Copper CRM or Freshsales?
faqs.answer: Both Copper CRM and Freshsales prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which crm & sales tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Copper CRM for large teams, while Freshsales may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $23-69/mo pricing.
